step_rationale: Oxidized phospholipid metabolite; lipid oxidation marker and pro-inflammatory signaling mediator.
mechanism: Lysophosphatidylcholines are oxidized phospholipid metabolites that promote inflammatory signaling and contribute to plaque destabilization in acute coronary syndrome.

references.title: Human serum lipidomics analysis revealed glyphosate may lead to lipid metabolism disorders and health risks.
Defining Acute Coronary Syndrome through Metabolomics.
